chapter_title.ar: باب السَّلَمِ فِي الرَّقِيقِ وَ غَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْحَيَوَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 98 – The submission of advance payment regarding the slave and others from the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/255)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/255)
text: لَا بَأْسَ بِالسَّلَمِ فِي الْحَيَوَانِ إِذَا وُصِفَتْ أَسْنَانُهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no problem with the submission of the advance payment regarding the animals, when its age has been described’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Advance payment to buy an animal is not unlawful if the age of animals is clearly described.’”
